description: Verso and bottom of recto: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Verso is headed: "inventory of that which I brought with me to Būṣīr." Mentions names such as Yaʿaqov; Abū l-Khayr; Qāsim (mentioned in other letters as a middleman in the flax business in Būṣīr); Ibn Barakāt; a packer (ḥazzām); Ḥamza; Ibn al-Waliyy(?).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
